title: CubeGen
description: Instantly create, customize, and manage unique cubes for your Minecraft world!
body:
✨ CubeGen – Create Your Own Custom Cubes!

CubeGen is a unique and powerful Minecraft plugin that lets you instantly create and customize your own cubes with just one simple command! 🎉

🚀 Features:

Generate custom cubes anytime you want

Easy-to-use interface for all players

Short commands like /cg for faster access

Perfect for Survival, SkyBlock, and Mini-Game servers

Lightweight & optimized ✨ (no lag or performance issues)

🛠 Commands:

/cubeGen or /cg → Open the cube menu and start building

🎯 Why CubeGen?

Because it makes your server more fun and interactive!
With CubeGen, your players can unleash creativity and add a whole new layer of excitement to the gameplay.
